name: @sherif-fanous/pi-atom-one
description: Atom One themes for the Pi Coding Agent
readme:
# @sherif-fanous/pi-atom-one

Atom One themes for the Pi Coding Agent. This package provides both the dark and light Atom One flavors as installable Pi themes.

## Install

```shell
pi install npm:@sherif-fanous/pi-atom-one
```

Or try without installing

```shell
pi -e npm:@sherif-fanous/pi-atom-one
```

Then select a theme via `/settings`.

## Uninstall

```shell
pi remove npm:@sherif-fanous/pi-atom-one
```
